# CoreKnot Desktop Beta 1.0.8-beta.2

Beta desktop update for CoreKnot auth and downloads.

## Downloads

- Windows: download `CoreKnot-Beta-1.0.8-beta.2-win-x64.exe` from this release.

## What Changed

- Desktop sign-in now opens a dedicated CoreKnot auth popup instead of keeping Clerk login inside the main app view.
- Auth popup shares the desktop app session, so Clerk cookies return to the app after sign-in.
- CoreKnot landing page now links directly to the desktop beta release.

## Update Notes

Existing CoreKnot Desktop Beta users should see the beta update prompt after the app checks GitHub releases.
